positive: A highly detailed, intricate geometric pattern featuring stylized wildlife elements like majestic roaring lions, soaring eagles, and graceful elephants integrated with abstract, flowing celestial patterns. The composition should be perfectly centered and symmetrical, designed to be a repeating seamless tile. Use a deep jewel-toned color palette of sapphire blue, emerald green, rich gold, and deep indigo. The style should be a sophisticated blend of Art Deco opulence and ornate Mehndi henna patterns, rendered with strong, crisp black outlines against a cream background to ensure maximum print contrast. Clean silhouettes and high contrast are essential for apparel application.
negative: blurry, artifacts, noise, text, watermark, low resolution, cartoon, grainy, abstract, bleeding colors, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy lines, logos, trademarks, copyrighted characters
